rationale.R1.6: The agent improved the text with tighter prose and removed filler, preserving original meaning but without a full copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty was flagged for specific points like time span accuracy and OLS appropriateness, though not comprehensively for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed strictly within scope, only polishing without structural changes.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced, maintaining safety.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance was partial; major edits traced but minor ones not annotated.
